headline: Lumentum Holdings Inc. to Join the Nasdaq-100 Index® Beginning  May 18, 2026
summary: NEW YORK, May 08, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Nasdaq (Nasdaq: NDAQ) today announced that Lumentum Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: LITE) will become a component of the Nasdaq-100 Index® replacing CoStar Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: CSGP) prior to market open on Monday, May 18, 2026.
